Class ConcreteInstructionSet

java.lang.Object
dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.ConcreteInstructionSet
All Implemented Interfaces:
IInstructionSet
public final class ConcreteInstructionSet extends Object implements IInstructionSet
Concrete implementations of IInstructionSet.

This class maintains a registry of all available instructions for the Registermaschine. It supports lookup by mnemonic or opcode, enforces uniqueness of opcode, and allows removing instructions by their handler class.

Internally, the instructions are stored in:

  • instructions - ordered list of all instructions
  • byName - map from lowercase mnemonic to instruction
  • ByOpcode - map from opcode to instruction

This class throws ExistingInstructionException if an instruction with the same opcode is already registered, and UnknownInstructionException if lookup fails.

Since:
1.0.0
Author:
TiJ

  • Constructor Details

    • ConcreteInstructionSet

      public ConcreteInstructionSet()

  • Method Details

    • registerInstruction

      public void registerInstruction(ConfigInstruction configInstruction)
      Registers a new instruction in the set.

      The opcode must be unique; if it is already registered an ExistingInstructionException is thrown.

      Specified by:
      registerInstruction in interface IInstructionSet
      Parameters:
      configInstruction - the instruction configuration to register

    • prohibitInstructionHandler

      public void prohibitInstructionHandler(Class<? extends AbstractInstruction> instruction)
      Removes all instructions implemented by a specific handler class from the set

      Any matching instruction is removed from the list, mnemonic map, and opcode map.

      Specified by:
      prohibitInstructionHandler in interface IInstructionSet
      Parameters:
      instruction - the AbstractInstruction class to prohibit

    • getHandler

      public AbstractInstruction getHandler(String mnemonic)
      Description copied from interface: IInstructionSet
      Returns the instruction handler associated with the given mnemonic.
      Specified by:

      Parameters:
      mnemonic - the instruction mnemonic
      Returns:
      the corresponding instruction handler
